title: Looking for Category Manager at JioMart

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at JioMart
jsonLd.description:
Join the JioMart family as a Category Manager in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About JioMart:
JioMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JioMart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
